content_body: What a beautiful home away from home for our family of 5. My husband and I and our 3 young adult children from Iowa and Chicago met for Christmas. It was so nice to have a warm, inviting place to meet. The townhome is very nicely furnished and decorated, and I can't say enough about your beautiful well-equipped kitchen. It had everything we needed for preparing our meals with plenty of dishes and cooking utensils. We loved the double oven and gas stove! The kitchen is spacious for gathering around the center island. This house has two comfortable sitting rooms and a dining room. The bedrooms are located upstairs with comfortable beds and nice linens! With having the two levels, we never felt cramped for space. The neighborhood is quiet, and grocery stores are a short driving distance. Plenty of attractions and shopping in Atlanta, all close by to drive to. The owners were easy to work with—no problems in making arrangements. Thank you for letting our family enjoy your gorgeous home and making our Christmas together memorable!
title: Memorable Christmas
